docs.title: IPU C Samples Documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the IPU C Samples documentation.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
This repository contains samples and tools for IPU development, including:

  • IPU Assembly Language (ipu-as)
  • Sample C programs
  • Build system (Bazel)

docs.title: Quick Links
docs.text:
• Instruction Reference - Complete IPU assembly instruction set
  • Getting Started - Start writing IPU assembly

docs.title: Repository Structure
docs.text:
ipu-c-samples/
├── src/
│   └── tools/
│       └── ipu-as-py/    # IPU assembler
├── docs/                  # Documentation
└── BUILD.bazel           # Bazel build files

docs.title: IPU Assembly Instruction Reference
docs.text: This document describes all available IPU assembly instructions.

docs.title: XMEM Instructions
docs.text: Memory access instructions for loading and storing data between registers and memory.

docs.title: Supported Operations:
docs.text:
• ldr: Load data from memory to register using address in Lr and offset in Cr
  • str: Store data from register to memory using address in Lr and offset in Cr
  • xmem_nop: No operation for XMEM pipeline

docs.title: Operands:
docs.text:
• Rx: Data register
  • Lr: Address register
  • Cr: Offset register

docs.title: MAC Instructions
docs.text: Multiply-accumulate instructions for vector and scalar operations.

docs.title: Supported Operations:
docs.text:
• mac.ee: Element-wise multiply-accumulate (3 Rx operands)
  • mac.ev: Element-vector multiply-accumulate (3 Rx operands + 1 Lr operand)
  • mac.agg: Aggregate multiply-accumulate (3 Rx operands + 1 Lr operand)
  • mac_nop: No operation for MAC pipeline

docs.title: Operands:
docs.text:
• Rx: Vector/scalar data registers
  • Lr: Loop/address register (for mac.ev and mac.agg)

docs.title: LR Instructions
docs.text: Loop register manipulation instructions for controlling loop counters and addresses.

docs.title: Supported Operations:
docs.text:
• incr: Increment Lr register by immediate value
  • set: Set Lr register to immediate value

docs.title: Conditional Branch Instructions
docs.text: Control flow instructions for branching based on conditions or unconditionally.

docs.title: Supported Operations:
docs.text:
• beq: Branch if equal (compare two Lr registers)
  • bne: Branch if not equal (compare two Lr registers)
  • blt: Branch if less than (compare two Lr registers)
  • bnz: Branch if not zero (compare two Lr registers)
  • bz: Branch if zero (compare two Lr registers)
  • b: Unconditional branch to label
  • br: Branch to address in Lr register
  • bkpt: Breakpoint (halt execution)

docs.title: Operands:
docs.text:
• Lr: Loop/address registers for comparison or branch target
  • Label: Branch target label (resolved at assembly time)
